title: Twelve Miles Out
writer: Joseph Farnham, William Anthony McGuire, Andrew Percival Younger
actors: John Gilbert, Ernest Torrence, Joan Crawford
plot: Jerry always wins in his rivalry with Red over women, gunrunning, and diamond smuggling. While running booze into the U.S. during Prohibition, Jerry seizes Jane's seaside home. When she tries to turn him in, he kidnaps her and her...
